name: Suzhou TZTEK Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Suzhou TZTEK Technology Co., Ltd. provides industrial visual equipment based on artificial intelligence technology. Its products include precision measuring instruments, intelligent testing equipment, intelligent manufacturing systems, unmanned logistics vehicles, etc. for use in the areas of measurement and defect detection, automatic production and assembly, and intelligent warehousing and logistics. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
